title: Governor to publish annually list of defaulters reported to him
doc_html:
§307.  Governor to publish annually list of defaulters reported to him

The governor shall report to the legislature and cause to be published annually, in the official journal of the state, a list of all persons who appear to be defaulters by the reports on file in his office.
doc_text:
§307.  Governor to publish annually list of defaulters reported to him
The governor shall report to the legislature and cause to be published annually, in the official journal of the state, a list of all persons who appear to be defaulters by the reports on file in his office.
